song.title: Light the Fire
song.author: Bill Maxwell
song.lyrics: .A2: 006770 .B4: 008990 [V1] . F C Bb F .E B4 A2 B4 I stand to praise you, but I fall on my knees . F C Bb C . E B4 A2 B4 My spirit is hungry, but my flesh is so weak [C] . Gm7 . A2 So, light the fire <Light the fire> . C . B4 In my soul <In my weary soul> . Gm7 . A2 Fan the flame <Fan the flame> . C . B4 Make me whole <Make my spirit whole> . Gm7 . A2 Lord you know <Lord you know> . C . B4 Where I’ve been <Just where I’ve been> . Bb C Dm (last time F) . A2 B4 E So, light the fire in my heart again (2x) [V2] I feel your arms around me, as the power of your healing begins Your spirit moves through me, like a mighty rushing wind
